name: super-helper
description: A chat-first helper agent that mediates between users, workspaces, MCP tools, and Claude Code workers.

scripts.knowledge:init: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge init
scripts.knowledge:update: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge update
scripts.knowledge:extract: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge extract
scripts.knowledge:normalize: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge normalize
scripts.knowledge:slice: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge slice
scripts.knowledge:audit: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge audit
scripts.knowledge:repair: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge repair --plan
scripts.knowledge:review: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge review
scripts.knowledge:publish: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge publish
scripts.knowledge:eval: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js knowledge eval
scripts.accept:knowledge: pnpm build && node dist/cli.js accept knowledge
scripts.test: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && node --test test/*.test.mjs
